notes:
**Fixes & polish**

- **Every way of selecting now paints.** Selections made in one jump — ⌘-Home
  and the other select-to-start/end shortcuts, shift-clicking far away (even
  across several screens), double-clicks — now show the highlight bar
  immediately, exactly like dragging or arrow-key selection always did. (The
  overlay listened for the browser's selection signal, which can arrive before
  the editor has caught up on one-shot changes; it now also listens to the
  editor itself. PRD Addendum 23 §V.)
- **Pasting Markdown with nested lists keeps what follows.** Text after a
  nested list no longer gets swallowed into the list — the converter now
  closes every level properly, keeps ordered lists ordered at each depth, and
  handles task lists and mixed nesting. (PRD Addendum 1 §A6-adjacent paste
  path.)

**Under the hood**

- The conformance P2 sweep: 35 more scenarios enforced across paste, platform
  controls, performance at 10k-block scale, and main-thread I/O; the
  performance test suite recalibrated to be load-honest (no more false alarms
  under CI contention). Program totals: 40 real bugs found and fixed.
